name: hope
description: Understand any supported GitHub pull request before review or merge through a clear explanation, key code, risks, an interactive model, and a quiz.

interface.shortDescription: Understand a PR before review or merge
interface.longDescription: Give Hope a GitHub pull request URL. It creates one private offline review that explains what changed and why, maps the behavior, highlights risks and key code, lets you try important scenarios, and checks your understanding.
defaultPrompt: Use $hope:diff with a GitHub pull request URL to explain what changed, show the behavior, risks, and key code, let me try important scenarios, and check my understanding.
